name: kxco-pq-cli
description: CLI for kxco-post-quantum: keygen, fingerprint, key rotation, signed rotation manifests. Generates ML-DSA-65 keypairs deterministically from a master secret + label; emits well-known JSON + RFC 8785 JCS-canonical signed manifests during rotation.
author: KXCO by Knightsbridge <hello@kxco.ai>

scripts.test: node --test test/jcs.test.js test/manifest.test.js test/keygen.test.js test/fingerprint.test.js test/rotate.test.js
scripts.lint: node -c bin/kxco-pq.js && node -c src/cli.js && node -c src/jcs.js && node -c src/manifest.js && node -c src/commands/keygen.js && node -c src/commands/fingerprint.js && node -c src/commands/rotate.js
